actions.name: context.search
actions.description: Search prior OpenPhone assistant conversation and task context.

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return.

reason.description: Why this prior context is needed.

actions.name: notifications.list
actions.description: List recent indexed Android notifications.

limit.description: Maximum number of notifications to return.

actions.name: notifications.search
actions.description: Search recent indexed Android notifications.

limit.description: Maximum number of notifications to return.

actions.name: notifications.summarize
actions.description: Summarize recent indexed Android notifications into app/title groups.

limit.description: Maximum number of notifications to inspect.

actions.name: notifications.open
actions.description: Open an active Android notification through its content intent.

actions.name: calendar.search
actions.description: Search Android calendar events in a bounded time window.

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return.

actions.name: calendar.create_event
actions.description: Create an Android calendar event in the user's writable calendar.

all_day.description: Whether this is an all-day event.

reason.description: Why this event should be created.

actions.name: calendar.create_event_from_message
actions.description: Create an Android calendar event with SMS message provenance in the event description.

all_day.description: Whether this is an all-day event.

reason.description: Why this message should create a calendar event.

actions.name: calendar.update_event
actions.description: Update fields of an existing Android calendar event (title, time, location, description). Recurring events update the whole series.

start_at.description: New start, Unix time in milliseconds.

end_at.description: New end, Unix time in milliseconds.

duration_minutes.description: New duration if end_at is omitted.

all_day.description: Whether this is an all-day event.

reason.description: Why this event should be changed.

actions.name: calendar.delete_event
actions.description: Delete an Android calendar event permanently. Recurring events delete the whole series.

reason.description: Why this event should be deleted.

actions.name: calendar.check_availability
actions.description: Check calendar free/busy in a time window: returns merged busy intervals and free slots long enough for a requested duration. Use before scheduling to avoid conflicts.

start_at.description: Window start, Unix time in milliseconds, or 0 for now.

end_at.description: Window end, Unix time in milliseconds, or 0 for start plus 7 days.

duration_minutes.description: Minimum free-slot length to report, default 30.

actions.name: contacts.search
actions.description: Search Android contacts by name, phone, email, or organization.

query.description: Optional name, phone, or email query.

limit.description: Maximum number of contacts to return.

actions.name: messages.search
actions.description: Search Android SMS message history by sender, body, or address.

query.description: Optional sender, body, or address query.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return.

actions.name: messages.summarize
actions.description: Summarize recent Android SMS conversations by thread.

query.description: Optional sender, body, or address filter.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to inspect.

since.description: Only messages at or after this Unix time in milliseconds, or 0.

actions.name: messages.draft
actions.description: Prepare a structured SMS draft for review without sending it.

contact_query.description: Contact name if recipient should be resolved.

actions.name: messages.send
actions.description: Send an SMS message to a phone number.

reason.description: Why this SMS should be sent.

actions.name: phone.search_calls
actions.description: Search Android call log entries by number, contact name (joined from contacts when the log has none), type, or date range.

query.description: Optional number or cached contact name.

type.description: Optional call type filter: missed, incoming, outgoing, voicemail, rejected, or blocked.

limit.description: Maximum number of calls to return.

since.description: Only calls at or after this Unix time in milliseconds, or 0.

until.description: Only calls at or before this Unix time in milliseconds, or 0.

reason.description: Why call history context is needed.

actions.name: phone.context
actions.description: Gather a call context card from call log, contacts, messages, and calendar, including missed calls not yet returned.

query.description: Optional person, business, trip, or confirmation query.

limit.description: Maximum number of rows per source.

actions.name: phone.call
actions.description: Place a phone call to a number.

contact_query.description: Contact name if number should be resolved.

reason.description: Why this call should be placed.

actions.name: memory.search
actions.description: Search durable OpenPhone memories.

limit.description: Maximum number of memories to return.

actions.name: memory.save
actions.description: Save explicit durable user memory.

actions.name: commitments.search
actions.description: List or search the user's OpenPhone commitments (reminders, follow-ups, scheduled tasks). Pass query="" (empty string) to get the full active list — including ones that just fired in the last day. Pass a query string ONLY when the user is asking about a specific topic (e.g. 'do I have any reminders about the dentist?'). Generic words like 'reminder', 'task', or 'commitment' are NOT good FTS queries and will return nothing — for those, use query="".

query.description: Free-text search over commitment titles. Use empty string for 'list everything'. Avoid generic terms like 'reminder' — they will not match anything because every commitment is already a reminder.

limit.description: Maximum number of commitments to return.

reason.description: Why this commitment context is needed.

actions.name: commitments.create
actions.description: Create a durable OpenPhone commitment.

actions.name: notifications.create_commitment
actions.description: Create a durable OpenPhone commitment from an indexed notification.

reason.description: Why this notification should become a commitment.

actions.name: messages.create_commitment
actions.description: Create a durable OpenPhone commitment from an SMS message.

reason.description: Why this message should become a commitment.

actions.name: commitments.update_status
actions.description: Update a durable commitment status.

actions.name: watchers.create
actions.description: Create a durable OpenPhone watcher.

source.description: Generic source such as web, notification, message, call, time, or screen.

query.description: Condition text for text or semantic evaluators.

url.description: Web URL when source is web.

type.description: Compatibility type: time, notification, web_change, message_reply, or call_back.

address.description: Phone number or sender to watch when source is message.

number.description: Phone number to watch when source is call.

direction.description: For call watchers: any (default), incoming, or outgoing.

thread_id.description: SMS thread id to watch when source is message.

deadline_at.description: Unix milliseconds deadline for message or call watchers; with notify_on no_reply or no_call, fires if nothing arrived by then.

notify_on.description: For message watchers: reply (default) or no_reply. For call watchers: call (default; alert when a call with the number appears) or no_call (alert only if the deadline passes without one).

interval_ms.description: Polling interval in milliseconds if relevant.

actions.name: watchers.list
actions.description: List active OpenPhone watchers.

limit.description: Maximum number of watchers to return.

actions.name: watchers.stop
actions.description: Stop an active OpenPhone watcher.

actions.name: screen.get
actions.description: Read the current phone screen and optional screenshot.

actions.name: screen.watch
actions.description: Observe the current screen for a short duration.

actions.name: apps.search
actions.description: Search launchable installed Android apps by label, package, or activity.

query.description: Optional app label, package, or activity query.

limit.description: Maximum number of apps to return.

reason.description: Why installed app context is needed.

actions.name: apps.open
actions.description: Open an installed Android app.

label.description: Optional explicit app label when package_or_label is a package name.

actions.name: browser.open_url
actions.description: Open a URL directly in the browser.

actions.name: browser.search
actions.description: Open a web search query in the browser without typing into the browser UI.

reason.description: Why this web search is needed.

actions.name: browser.fetch_page
actions.description: Fetch a web page and return bounded extracted title/text plus heading outline and outgoing links for follow-up navigation.

max_chars.description: Maximum extracted text characters to return.

reason.description: Why this page context is needed.

links.description: Outgoing links (text + resolved url) usable for follow-up fetches.

actions.name: device.tap
actions.description: Tap absolute screen coordinates.

reason.description: Why this coordinate should be tapped.

actions.name: device.tap_element
actions.description: Tap an enabled interactive element by screen element id.

reason.description: Why this element should be tapped.

actions.name: device.long_press
actions.description: Long press absolute screen coordinates.

reason.description: Why this coordinate should be long-pressed.

actions.name: device.long_press_element
actions.description: Long press an enabled interactive element by screen element id.

reason.description: Why this element should be long-pressed.

actions.name: device.swipe
actions.description: Swipe from one coordinate to another.

actions.name: device.type_text
actions.description: Type text into the focused field.

actions.name: device.press_key
actions.description: Press a supported Android navigation or IME key.

key.description: back, home, recents, enter, search, or go.

actions.name: clipboard.set
actions.description: Set clipboard text.

actions.name: clipboard.paste
actions.description: Paste clipboard into the focused field.

actions.name: share.text
actions.description: Share text through Android's mediated share flow.

actions.name: control.wait
actions.description: Wait briefly before the next observation.

actions.name: assistant.ask_user_confirmation
actions.description: Ask the user to approve a pending risky action.

actions.name: assistant.finish_task
actions.description: Finish the active task with a summary.

actions.name: assistant.fail_task
actions.description: Stop the active task because it cannot complete safely or correctly.
